basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT (Sanskrit) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website of Sainik School Chittorgarh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT (Sanskrit) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Sanskrit with at least 50% marks and B.Ed with Sanskrit from a recognised university, Qualified in CTET, Proficiency in English, Hindi and Sanskrit (Verbal & Written)
qualification.details: TGT (Sanskrit): Graduate with Sanskrit with at least 50% marks and B.Ed with Sanskrit from a recognised university. Qualified in CTET. Medium of instruction – Sanskrit. Desirable: Minimum 5 years teaching experience in Residential English Medium Public School. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Sanskrit (Verbal & Written).

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level 7 (₹44900 to ₹1,42,400) as per 7th CPC + DA and other allowances

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT (Sanskrit) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sschittorgarh.edu.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT (Sanskrit) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Chittorgarh TGT (Sanskrit) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the TGT (Sanskrit) post is 04 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the TGT (Sanskrit) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with Sanskrit and at least 50% marks, along with a B.Ed in Sanskrit from a recognized university. CTET qualification and proficiency in English, Hindi, and Sanskrit are also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the TGT (Sanskrit) post is between 21 years and 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the TGT (Sanskrit) position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the TGT (Sanskrit) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in Pay Matrix Level 7, ranging from ₹44,900 to ₹1,42,400 per month, along with Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Sainik School Chittorgarh recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 250/- for all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, followed by a Class Demonstration, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for the TGT (Sanskrit) post?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, a minimum of 5 years of teaching experience in a Residential English Medium Public School is considered desirable for the TGT (Sanskrit) position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Chittorgarh, which is https://sschittorgarh.edu.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as your photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates as specified in the official notification.
